name: skill-creator
description: Creates well-scoped, spec-compliant registry skills with prescriptive instructions and high-quality examples.
trigger: Activate this skill when the user wants to create a new skill for the claude-skills-registry, asks for help writing a SKILL.md, or wants to turn a prompt or workflow into a reusable skill. Do not activate for general prompt engineering questions, modifying existing skills, or tasks unrelated to the registry format.
author: lediegz
